data.title: Add Bootstrap row to CLAUDE.md Quick Reference table
data.description:
testing_mode: UPDATE

Insert a Bootstrap row in CLAUDE.md Quick Reference table (lines 11-41). Uses -fsSL curl flags consistently. URL contains <org> placeholder pending Layer 2 story 8356-7324 which delivers create-dso-app.sh.

Bootstrap row to insert:
  | Bootstrap a NextJS project | `bash <(curl -fsSL <url>)` or `/dso:nextjs-starter` |

where <url> is https://raw.githubusercontent.com/<org>/digital-service-orchestra/HEAD/plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh (placeholder; update when 8356-7324 ships).

TDD: RED test test_claude_md_has_bootstrap_row (written in dependency task f949-c432) fails before this task because no Bootstrap row exists. After insert, bash tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh test_claude_md_has_bootstrap_row exits 0 (GREEN).

Acceptance Criteria:
- Verify: grep -q 'Bootstrap' CLAUDE.md
- Verify: grep -q 'curl -fsSL' CLAUDE.md
- Verify: bash tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh test_claude_md_has_bootstrap_row
